keyEvents.text: Naqwan Henry (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  US Virgin Islands 0, Cayman Islands 1. Jonah Ebanks (Cayman Islands) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Wesley Robinson (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Own Goal by Casey McLaughlin, Cayman Islands.  US Virgin Islands 1, Cayman Islands 1.
Jett Blaschka (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Cameron Gray (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  US Virgin Islands 2, Cayman Islands 1. Jimson Saint Louis (US Virgin Islands) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner.
First Half ends, US Virgin Islands 2, Cayman Islands 1.

Goal!  US Virgin Islands 2, Cayman Islands 2. Cameron Gray (Cayman Islands) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Casey McLaughlin with a headed pass   following a corner.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Elijah Seymour replaces Wesley Robinson.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Orion Mills replaces Raejae Joseph.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Jah Dain Alexander replaces Alexander Clarke-Ramírez because of an injury.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Sebastian Martinez replaces Matthew Suberan.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Matthew Roth replaces Naqwan Henry.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Jordan Bonilla replaces Jonah Ebanks because of an injury.
Second yellow card to Jett Blaschka (US Virgin Islands) for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, US Virgin Islands 2, Cayman Islands 2.

Attempt saved. James Ebanks (Cayman Islands) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal. Assisted by Rashaad Powery with a cross.
